ui_design.note: Operator requested extra high-polish directions beyond the scope-dial cap of 2. v1 Event Horizon, v2 Almanac, v3 Aurora, v4 Chromatica, v5 Nebula Drift. Operator chose v5 family, then requested 3 variations (v5a Lumen, v5b Flux, v5c Pulse) with real royalty-free imagery + richer effects/animation. v3-v5 + v5a-c POCs are Home-page pitches; winner fleshed to all 5 routes at /implement.

values: Prompt-only dogfood request (2026-06-09): marketing-ready Content SDK head app themed cosmos/stellar/space; exercise the full pipeline and observe how it reacts.

stage_history.one_line: Standard discovery; scope dial (rigor=std, ui=2, live tenant) + 3 scope questions (5 routes, no commerce, Vercel); content-sdk NEW site
stage_history.notes: Sitecore-aware: NEW-site flow, live tenant, App Router. SITE_COLLECTION_NAME=cosmos, SITE_NAME=aphelion.

stage_history.one_line: Operator confirmed recap + the two-PRD split (Acts 1-2 / Act 3) + presentational-only forms
PRD-000 (Acts 1-2) written + standard critical review (6 findings, all resolved + folded) + prd-minimal + 5 ADRs

escalations.item: Arrays map to folder-of-child-items datasource (SXA Children resolver), not multilist — load-bearing content-model decision (ADR-0005)
Newsletter + Contact presentational-only in v1 (no backend) — ADR-0006

stage_history.notes: Critical review standard level; operator answered YES to all six resolutions (build mode, fidelity threshold, array rule, missing rows, nav exception, Lighthouse soft-target).

stage_history.one_line: Feature-scoped architecture for Acts 1-2 (static app + content-model derivation); SDK-contract gate N/A (no live SDK), deferred to PRD-001; 2 new ADRs (0007 stack, 0008 test/fidelity)
stage_history.notes: 2 new ADRs this run (< 5 density hard-stop). create-next-app static app (NOT create-content-sdk-app, that's PRD-001).

stage_history.one_line: Baseline-promotion gate met (8 total ADRs) but recommended skip: first PRD, no ADR has survived 2+ PRDs yet
stage_history.notes: Re-evaluate promotion at PRD-001/002 once decisions have proven durable.

stage_history.one_line: 8 directions explored (v1-v5 + v5a/b/c variations, all radical, dark+light+system); operator chose v5b 'Flux' (Nebula Drift abstract-render edition)

escalations.item: UI direction = v5b Flux (Nebula Drift abstract-render); winning POC poc-v5b-prd000 is visual source of truth
v5b uses royalty-free Unsplash imagery (real images) + SVG #gooey filter; perf (NFR-1) + font self-host (Clash Display) to confirm at /implement

stage_history.notes: Operator requested 3 extra directions (v3/v4/v5) beyond cap, then 3 variations of chosen v5 (v5a/b/c). v3-v5 + v5a-c POCs are Home-only pitches; v5b fleshed to all 5 routes at /implement.

stage_history.one_line: 40-task breakdown (E1-E5: foundation/home/inner/fidelity/spec); theme-hydration probe gated first (T013); all 7 §4c filled (4c-6 N/A no-SDK); scaffold=create-next-app not create-content-sdk-app

escalations.item: POC is Home-only — inner routes (T030-T032) fidelity-verified against their own committed baselines, not POC frames (§4c-7)

stage_history.notes: task_breakdown_review=skip_gate → auto-continued to QA without operator stop.

stage_history.one_line: TDD enrichment in place (587→1027 lines): §9 contract + §10 per-task tests + 54 test cases (TC-01..54) + 3 RED→GREEN splits (T006/T023/T028) + runtime AA-contrast asserts; style=tdd
stage_history.notes: No standalone qa-report (enriched breakdown IS the test contract). No real-tenant smoke (no tenant in PRD-000); fidelity gate + axe a11y are the bar. SDK fixture rule N/A (no SDK calls) — deferred to PRD-001.

operator_attention.item: NEW-site build split into PRD-000 (Acts 1-2, no tenant) + later PRD-001 (Act 3, live tenant) — ADR-0002
Newsletter + Contact are presentational-only in v1 (no submit backend) — Assumption A1 / ADR-0006
Typography pairing + accent hue (OQ-1) and final destination/experience content set (OQ-2) deferred to /architect (UI Designer proposes 2 variants)
UI direction locked = v5b 'Flux' (Nebula Drift abstract-render edition); poc-v5b-prd000 is visual source of truth. Resolves OQ-1/OQ-2.

v5b carry-forward to /implement: self-host Clash Display (Fontshare) or ship Outfit-as-display; guard SVG #gooey filter perf (NFR-1) with reduced-motion freeze; flesh Home-only POC to all 5 routes; real Unsplash imagery is royalty-free (PRD-compliant) but needs network.
§4c-6 marked N/A (no backend/live SDK in PRD-000) — intentional; SDK-contract + real-tenant smoke deferred to PRD-001. Validate this is acceptable.

POC is Home-only — inner routes (Destinations/Experiences/About/Contact, T030-T032) fidelity-verified against their own committed Playwright baselines, not a POC frame. Your fidelity review of inner routes is judgment, not POC-diff.

notes.lineage: PRD-000 = Acts 1-2 of Content SDK NEW-site flow (static app + content-model spec). PRD-001 (future) = Act 3 (head-app port + deploy). Dogfood of custom_content-sdk-website-build-flow.
